title: prostanthera howelliae
intro: Prostanthera howelliae, also known as Howell's mint bush, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is known for its essential oil, which possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prostanthera howelliae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, ease respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic. Prostanthera howelliae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically for its medicinal benefits.
